TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-pear_lubi 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: eniqan ka kingan anu ka seediq anu ka waga kiya waga so meniq so anu ka a neepahna seediq nii ma.
S.PHON: eniqan ka kiŋan anu ka seediq anu ka waga kija waga so meniq so anu ka a neepaħna seediq nii ma.
S.FORM: eniqan ka kingan anu ka seediq anu ka waga kiya waga so meniq so anu ka a neepahna seediq nii ma.
S.PHON: eniqan ka kiŋan anu ka seediq anu ka waga kija waga so meniq so anu ka a neepaħna seediq nii ma.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人在他自己的田裡.
There was a person who was in his own field.

S.FORM: waga musa a lmamu anu ka hei na qhuni yaani qutirodux uri yaani maanu inimu kelai.
S.PHON: waga musa a lmamu anu ka ħei na qħuni jaani qutiɾodux uɾi jaani maanu inimu kelai.
S.FORM: waga musa a lmamu anu ka hei na qhuni yaani qutirodux uri yaani maanu inimu kelai.
S.PHON: waga musa a lmamu anu ka ħei na qħuni jaani qutiɾodux uɾi jaani maanu inimu kelai.
S.TRANSL: 他當時正在採收樹的果實,可能是芭樂之類的水果,我不知道.
He was picking the fruits of a tree, which were probably guavas or something. I don't know.

S.FORM: m ma kika wa musa lmamu wada hiya ka kingan ka so riso hari gaga mosa a mosa mangan a u musa mapa anu ka anu ka hei na qhuni kiya ma.
S.PHON: m ma kika wa musa lmamu wada ħija ka kiŋan ka so ɾiso ħaɾi gaga mosa a mosa maŋan a u musa mapa anu ka anu ka ħei na qħuni kija ma.
S.FORM: m ma kika wa musa lmamu wada hiya ka kingan ka so riso hari gaga mosa a mosa mangan a u musa mapa anu ka anu ka hei na qhuni kiya ma.
S.PHON: m ma kika wa musa lmamu wada ħija ka kiŋan ka so ɾiso ħaɾi gaga mosa a mosa maŋan a u musa mapa anu ka anu ka ħei na qħuni kija ma.

TRANSL.notes: 他去採(水果)後,來了個年輕人,去背起了樹的果實.

S.TRANSL: 他去採 後,來了個年輕人,去背起了樹的果實.

TRANSL.notes: As he went picking (the fruits), there came a young person who went to carry the tree fruits.

S.TRANSL: As he went picking , there came a young person who went to carry the tree fruits.

S.FORM: anu ka taapa anu ka anu ka rulu tmediq anu ka mapa kingal rawa napana anu ka hei qhuni kii yaani qutirodux ini kelai ma.
S.PHON: anu ka taapa anu ka anu ka ɾulu tmediq anu ka mapa kiŋal ɾawa napana anu ka ħei qħuni kii jaani qutiɾodux ini kelai ma.
S.FORM: anu ka taapa anu ka anu ka rulu tmediq anu ka mapa kingal rawa napana anu ka hei qhuni kii yaani qutirodux ini kelai ma.
S.PHON: anu ka taapa anu ka anu ka ɾulu tmediq anu ka mapa kiŋal ɾawa napana anu ka ħei qħuni kii jaani qutiɾodux ini kelai ma.

TRANSL.notes: 然後,(他)騎著腳踏車,帶著一籃水果,或許是芭樂吧,我不知道.

S.TRANSL: 然後, 騎著腳踏車,帶著一籃水果,或許是芭樂吧,我不知道.

TRANSL.notes: Then, (he) rode a bike, taking a basket of fruits, which were probably guavas. I don't know.

S.TRANSL: Then, rode a bike, taking a basket of fruits, which were probably guavas. I don't know.

S.FORM: kika wada so tmalang madis anu ka a kingal rawa a qutirodux kii di ma.
S.PHON: kika wada so tmalaŋ madis anu ka a kiŋal ɾawa a qutiɾodux kii di ma.
S.FORM: kika wada so tmalang madis anu ka a kingal rawa a qutirodux kii di ma.
S.PHON: kika wada so tmalaŋ madis anu ka a kiŋal ɾawa a qutiɾodux kii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他像是拿著那些水果在跑.
It's like he ran taking those fruits.

S.FORM: wa eniqan btunux ka elu kiya ma wada moda a so a ptebuk hiya di ma wada.
S.PHON: wa eniqan btunux ka elu kija ma wada moda a so a ptebuk ħija di ma wada.
S.FORM: wa eniqan btunux ka elu kiya ma wada moda a so a ptebuk hiya di ma wada.
S.PHON: wa eniqan btunux ka elu kija ma wada moda a so a ptebuk ħija di ma wada.

TRANSL.notes: 他經過的路上有石頭,而他撞到了(石頭).

S.TRANSL: 他經過的路上有石頭,而他撞到了 .
There was a stone on his way, and he bumped into it.

S.FORM: takun ka anu ka seediq a mapa anu ka a qutirodux kii di ma wada tdoruy kana ka anu ka hei na a napana qutirodux kii di ma.
S.PHON: takun ka anu ka seediq a mapa anu ka a qutiɾodux kii di ma wada tdoɾuj kana ka anu ka ħei na a napana qutiɾodux kii di ma.
S.FORM: takun ka anu ka seediq a mapa anu ka a qutirodux kii di ma wada tdoruy kana ka anu ka hei na a napana qutirodux kii di ma.
S.PHON: takun ka anu ka seediq a mapa anu ka a qutiɾodux kii di ma wada tdoɾuj kana ka anu ka ħei na a napana qutiɾodux kii di ma.

TRANSL.notes: 在路上有顆石頭.當他經過時,撞到了(那顆石頭)然後就跌倒了.他背的所有芭樂也都滾落了下來.

S.TRANSL: 在路上有顆石頭.當他經過時,撞到了 然後就跌倒了.他背的所有芭樂也都滾落了下來.
There was a stone on the road. As he went past, he bumped into it and fell. All those guavas that he carried rolled down.

S.FORM: gisu ka teru a riso so laqi ha di ma.
S.PHON: gisu ka teɾu a ɾiso so laqi ħa di ma.
S.FORM: gisu ka teru a riso so laqi ha di ma.
S.PHON: gisu ka teɾu a ɾiso so laqi ħa di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後,來了三個男孩,像是年紀比較小一點的.
Then, there came three boys, who seemed rather young.

S.FORM: wa qmita kiya ma wa mosa a dmayo anu ka a pstotui a ruluna wadaha dayoan lmamu anu ka qutiroduxna stenge kiya rawa di ma.
S.PHON: wa qmita kija ma wa mosa a dmajo anu ka a pstotui a ɾuluna wadaħa dajoan lmamu anu ka qutiɾoduxna steŋe kija ɾawa di ma.
S.FORM: wa qmita kiya ma wa mosa a dmayo anu ka a pstotui a ruluna wadaha dayoan lmamu anu ka qutiroduxna stenge kiya rawa di ma.
S.PHON: wa qmita kija ma wa mosa a dmajo anu ka a pstotui a ɾuluna wadaħa dajoan lmamu anu ka qutiɾoduxna steŋe kija ɾawa di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們前去幫忙將腳踏車扶起,並且將芭樂都撿起來裝滿籃子.
They went to help lift up his bike and pick up the guavas, refilling the basket.

S.FORM: kiya ka wada di wada mswaye di ma.
S.PHON: kija ka wada di wada mswaje di ma.
S.FORM: kiya ka wada di wada mswaye di ma.
S.PHON: kija ka wada di wada mswaje di ma.

TRANSL.notes: 然後,他們便離開,和(男孩)分開了.

S.TRANSL: 然後,他們便離開,和 分開了.

TRANSL.notes: Then, they went away, and separated (with the boy).

S.TRANSL: Then, they went away, and separated .

S.FORM: moda elu ka anu ka laqi kii wa qmita kingan anu ka anu ka uh bnubung na a tunux mntena hari a so a a bosi peni.
S.PHON: moda elu ka anu ka laqi kii wa qmita kiŋan anu ka anu ka uħ bnubuŋ na a tunux mntena ħaɾi a so a a bosi peni.
S.FORM: moda elu ka anu ka laqi kii wa qmita kingan anu ka anu ka uh bnubung na a tunux mntena hari a so a a bosi peni.
S.PHON: moda elu ka anu ka laqi kii wa qmita kiŋan anu ka anu ka uħ bnubuŋ na a tunux mntena ħaɾi a so a a bosi peni.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩經過路邊,看到一個用來蓋頭用的東西,有點像是帽子.
Those kids went passed the road and saw something used for covering the head, which was kind of like a hat.

S.FORM: m anu ka so bosi snalu na anu ka so sudu ye na uh irih so a anu ka trasi kii di ma kika.
S.PHON: m anu ka so bosi snalu na anu ka so sudu je na uħ iɾiħ so a anu ka tɾasi kii di ma kika.
S.FORM: m anu ka so bosi snalu na anu ka so sudu ye na uh irih so a anu ka trasi kii di ma kika.
S.PHON: m anu ka so bosi snalu na anu ka so sudu je na uħ iɾiħ so a anu ka tɾasi kii di ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 那帽子像是用草做成的.可能是斗笠吧.
The hat was made of something like grass. It seemed to be a leaf hat.

S.FORM: wa qmita kii deheya kii di ma wagana wana splawa a wana hrenang quwaqna mlawa anu ka miyuk quwaqna mlawa anu ka seediq wada taapa jidensha madis a a hei qhuni kii di ma.
S.PHON: wa qmita kii deħeja kii di ma wagana wana splawa a wana ħɾenaŋ quwaqna mlawa anu ka mijuk quwaqna mlawa anu ka seediq wada taapa jidensħal** madis a a ħei qħuni kii di ma.
S.FORM: wa qmita kii deheya kii di ma wagana wana splawa a wana hrenang quwaqna mlawa anu ka miyuk quwaqna mlawa anu ka seediq wada taapa jidensha madis a a hei qhuni kii di ma.
S.PHON: wa qmita kii deħeja kii di ma wagana wana splawa a wana ħɾenaŋ quwaqna mlawa anu ka mijuk quwaqna mlawa anu ka seediq wada taapa jidensħal** madis a a ħei qħuni kii di ma.

TRANSL.notes: 他們看到了(帽子)之後,便大叫,用嘴巴發出聲音吹口哨,呼喊已經騎著腳踏車帶走芭樂的那個人.

S.TRANSL: 他們看到了 之後,便大叫,用嘴巴發出聲音吹口哨,呼喊已經騎著腳踏車帶走芭樂的那個人.

TRANSL.notes: As they saw it (that hat), they called out, making noises and whistling with their mouths, to the person who had already gone riding the bicycle with the fruits.

S.TRANSL: As they saw it , they called out, making noises and whistling with their mouths, to the person who had already gone riding the bicycle with the fruits.

S.FORM: wa kberih mita waga maha mege ka anu ka bnubungna bunuxna kiya ka trasi kiya di.
S.PHON: wa kbeɾiħ mita waga maħa mege ka anu ka bnubuŋna bunuxna kija ka tɾasi kija di.
S.FORM: wa kberih mita waga maha mege ka anu ka bnubungna bunuxna kiya ka trasi kiya di.
S.PHON: wa kbeɾiħ mita waga maħa mege ka anu ka bnubuŋna bunuxna kija ka tɾasi kija di.

TRANSL.notes: (他)回頭看,然後他們就去將蓋頭的東西還給他,就是那頂斗笠.

S.TRANSL: 回頭看,然後他們就去將蓋頭的東西還給他,就是那頂斗笠.

TRANSL.notes: (He) looked back, and they they went to return the thing for covering his hat, that leaf hat.

S.TRANSL: looked back, and they they went to return the thing for covering his hat, that leaf hat.

S.FORM: ma kiya naq a wada mswaye di.
S.PHON: ma kija naq a wada mswaje di.
S.FORM: ma kiya naq a wada mswaye di.
S.PHON: ma kija naq a wada mswaje di.
S.TRANSL: 就是那樣.他們分開了.
That's all. They separated.

S.FORM: mhedu di.
S.PHON: mħedu di.
S.FORM: mhedu di.
S.PHON: mħedu di.
S.TRANSL: 我說完了.
I finished.
